title: Create your first air reservation
description: A complete walkthrough from flight search to confirmed booking.

steps.title: Open New Booking
steps.content:
From the top menu, go to **Reservations → New Booking**.

Select the booking type: **One-way**, **Round-trip**, or **Multi-city**.
steps.tip: Make sure the correct agency account is selected in the top-right corner.

steps.title: Search for flights
steps.content:
Enter:
- **Origin** and **Destination** (IATA codes or city name)
- **Travel dates**
- **Number of passengers** (ADT / CHD / INF)

Click **Search**.
steps.tip: Flexible date? Use the ±3 day calendar view to compare prices.

steps.title: Select a fare
steps.content:
Review the results list. Click any fare to expand **fare rules** (refund policy, change fees, baggage allowance).

Choose your preferred option and click **Select**.

steps.title: Enter passenger details
steps.content:
Fill in the passenger form:
1. Title, first name, last name (exactly as on passport)
2. Date of birth
3. Passport number + expiry (international routes)
4. Contact email and phone

steps.title: Review and confirm
steps.content:
Check the booking summary:
- Total price breakdown
- Fare basis and validity
- Passenger data

Click **Confirm Booking**. A **PNR** (booking reference) will be issued immediately.
steps.tip: The booking is NOT ticketed yet. Proceed to Issue Ticket or set up auto-ticketing.

title: Add a new agent to your account
description: How to create a new user account for an agent in your agency.

steps.title: Go to User Management
steps.content: Navigate to **Settings → Users** in the left sidebar.

steps.title: Create new user
steps.content:
Click **+ Add User** in the top-right corner.

Fill in:
- **Email address** (will be used for login)
- **First and last name**
- **Role** (see next step)

steps.title: Set role and permissions
steps.content:
Choose the appropriate role:

| Role | Can book | Can manage users | Can see reports |
|------|----------|-----------------|----------------|
| Agent | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Supervisor | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Admin | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
steps.tip: Start with **Agent** role and upgrade permissions later if needed.

steps.title: Send invitation
steps.content:
Click **Send Invitation**.

The new user will receive an email with a link to set their password.

The invitation link is valid for **48 hours**.

title: Reset an agent's password
description: Quickly reset access for an agent who is locked out.

steps.title: Find the user
steps.content:
Go to **Settings → Users**.

Search for the agent by name or email address.

steps.title: Trigger password reset
steps.content:
Click the **⋮** (more options) button next to the user.

Select **Send Password Reset Email**.

steps.title: Confirm
steps.content:
Click **Confirm**. The agent will receive a reset link to their registered email within 2 minutes.

The link expires after **24 hours**.
steps.tip: If the agent doesn't receive the email, check their spam folder or verify the email address is correct.

title: Set up agency markup rules
description: Configure service fees and markups applied to all bookings.

steps.title: Open Pricing settings
steps.content: Go to **Settings → Prices** in the left sidebar.

steps.title: Create a markup rule
steps.content:
Click **+ New Rule**.

Choose the rule type:
- **Fixed amount** (e.g. +€10 per booking)
- **Percentage** (e.g. +3% on base fare)
- **Per segment** (e.g. +€5 per flight leg)

steps.title: Set conditions
steps.content:
Optionally restrict the rule by:
- **Carrier** (apply only to specific airlines)
- **Route** (origin/destination pair)
- **Fare class** (Economy / Business)
- **Booking channel** (online / offline)

steps.title: Activate the rule
steps.content:
Click **Save** and toggle the rule to **Active**.

New bookings will immediately include this markup in the displayed price.
steps.tip: Test with a dummy search before going live to verify the markup is applied correctly.
